name: Partially my fault machine accident Boise, still get benefits?
description: Yes, workers' comp no-fault; third-party may reduce if partly at fault.

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault machine accident Boise, still get benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, workers' comp no-fault; third-party may reduce if partly at fault.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault, so yes, you get benefits regardless of fault.** Third-party suits use comparative negligence—over 50% fault bars recovery in Idaho[2]. Report anyway. Full medical paid. Lawyer assesses extra claims.
